summary: Phase 16 testing completed - All new features verified. Backend: 21/21 tests passed. Frontend: All key features working correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

critical_code_review_comments: Admin analytics period filter (today/yesterday/week/month) using IST timezone - WORKING
Customer alias field - create, search, update all working
Mark Packed / Undo Packed endpoints with proper role restrictions (admin/packaging only)
Dispatch page clickable order IDs with data-testid='dispatch-order-link-*'
State searchable dropdown in Add Address dialog using INDIAN_STATES
Invoice column for non-accounts roles showing Not Required/Pending/Uploaded
GST column for accounts role showing GST/Non-GST (verified via code review)

features_verified.admin_analytics_period_today: PASS - Returns IST-based data for today
features_verified.admin_analytics_period_yesterday: PASS - Returns IST-based data for yesterday
features_verified.admin_analytics_period_week: PASS - Returns IST-based data for current week
features_verified.admin_analytics_period_month: PASS - Returns IST-based data for current month
features_verified.customer_alias_create: PASS - Alias field saved on customer creation
features_verified.mark_packed_admin: PASS - Admin can mark orders as packed
features_verified.mark_packed_packaging: PASS - Packaging role can mark orders as packed
features_verified.undo_packed_admin: PASS - Admin can undo packed status
features_verified.undo_packed_only_packed_orders: PASS - Only works on packed orders
features_verified.dispatch_page_clickable_order_ids: PASS - Order IDs are clickable links (data-testid=dispatch-order-link-*)
features_verified.order_detail_mark_packed_btn: PASS - Mark Packed button visible for admin/packaging on new/packaging orders
features_verified.order_detail_undo_packed_btn: PASS - Undo Packed button visible for admin/packaging on packed orders
features_verified.packaging_role_edit_dispatch: PASS - Packaging role can see Edit button for dispatch fields
features_verified.packaging_role_formulation: PASS - Packaging role can see Formulation button
features_verified.create_order_state_dropdown: PASS - State field has searchable dropdown with Indian States
features_verified.create_order_alias_field: PASS - Alias field in New Customer dialog
features_verified.edit_customer_alias_field: PASS - Alias field in Edit Customer dialog
features_verified.all_orders_invoice_column: PASS - Invoice column shows Not Required/Pending/Uploaded for non-accounts
features_verified.all_orders_gst_column: PASS (code verified) - GST column shows GST/Non-GST for accounts role

seed_data_creation: Created test customers TEST_Phase16_* with unique phone numbers and aliases
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 16 features verified. User credentials: admin/admin123, test_packaging_user/test123, test_dispatch_user/test123, test_accounts/test123. The original credentials (Yogita/packaging123, Dispatch/dispatch123) do not work - use test_* users instead. GST column for accounts role verified via code review at AllOrders.js line 267-296.
